NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP TITLE 3A - VEXATIOUS LITIGANTS (CCP 391, ET SEQ.) FILED BY DEFENDANT DOE, SARAH

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, DEFENDANT SARAH DOE'S MOTION FOR RELIEF UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE TITLE 3A - VEXATIOUS LITIGANTS - CCP SEC 391, ET SEQ. IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING IS OFF CALENDAR. ON MAY 1, 2014, THE COURT ISSUED AN ORDER DETERMINING THAT PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER TO BE A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT. THE ACTION IS STAYED UNTIL 10 DAYS AFTER PLAINTIFF FILES A BOND IN THE AMOUNT $ 5,000.00 WITH THE COURT AND SAFEWAY HAS BEEN GIVEN WRITTEN NOTICE THEREOF. NO BOND HAS BEEN FILED WITH THE COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO #12353. (302)
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $470.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE JUN-26-2014, FILED BY DEFENDANT DOE, SARAH

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Continued To Aug-13-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleading Attachment Memo Supporting Motion
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seglenda Crigler, 415.545.3855, plaintiff in propria persona; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER's Motion For Judgment On The Pleading is off calendar. On May 1, 2014, the Court issued an order determining that Plaintiff Seglenda Crigler to be a vexatious litigant. The action is stayed until 10 days after Plaintiff files a bond in the amount $ 5,000.00 with the court and Safeway has been given written notice thereof. No bond has been filed with the Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Maria Viscio #12353.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Relief Under Code Of Civil Procedure Titel 3a - Vexatious Litigants - Ccp Sec 391, Et Seq.
Off Calendar May-01-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
J. Cross Creason, Esq. of Dillingham and Murphy, Tel. 415.397.2700, for defendant and moving party;
Seglenda Crigler, Tel. 415.545.3855, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT SARAH DOE'S Motion For Relief Under Code Of Civil Procedure Title 3A - Vexatious Litigants - CCP Sec 391, Et Seq. is granted. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Continued To Jun-11-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
